results.evidence: sync-setup.ts lines 99-109 call runHealthChecksForConfig() after setupIssueTracker() succeeds and display results via formatHealthCheckResults()
sync-health.ts lines 80-89 and 104-115 produce fail results with fix suggestions when credentials are missing. formatHealthCheckResults from integration-health-check.ts renders fix text.
sync-health.ts syncHealthCommand() returns 0 for healthy, 1 for failures, 2 for no providers. Registered in bin/specweave.js line 1007 as 'sync-health' command.

branch-utils.ts buildBranchName() checks options.includeExternalKey and calls resolveExternalBranchPrefix() to prepend ticket key. Test TC-012 in branch-utils.test.ts:23 confirms PROJ-123/sw/0521-smart-linking format.
branch-utils.ts lines 40-42 return baseName when includeExternalKey is false or metadata is null. Tests TC-014 (line 41) and TC-015 (line 6) confirm fallback.
pr-linker.ts resolveExternalBranchPrefix() returns raw JIRA key (PROJ-123 format) and AB#ID format for ADO. Tests in branch-utils.test.ts:32 and pr-linker.test.ts:21 confirm both formats.
pr-linker.ts linkToJira() calls jiraClient.addRemoteLink() for each collected JIRA key. link-pr CLI command (link-pr.ts) invokes linkPrToExternalTickets(). Registered in bin/specweave.js line 724.
pr-linker.ts linkToAdo() calls adoClient.addHyperlink() for each collected ADO work item ID. Same CLI integration path as JIRA.
pr-linker.ts linkToJira/linkToAdo catch errors per-item and push to result.errors array with log.warn(). Outer try-catch handles client init failures. Errors never thrown upward.
sync-health.ts getEnabledProviders() detects github/jira/ado from config. syncHealthCommand() runs checks for all enabled providers and displays via formatResults(). Registered in CLI router.
sync-health.ts lines 194-198 output JSON.stringify with results array and healthy boolean when options.json is true. Test TC-006 (line 180) validates JSON output.
sync-health.ts line 203 returns 0 when allHealthy, line 189 returns 2 when no providers, line 203 returns 1 when unhealthy. Tests TC-007/TC-008/TC-009 cover all exit codes.
